zh.lifeSummary: Richard comte d'Évreux是Robert de Normandie和Herleva of Falaise的兒子，於1000年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧。他與Godehildis在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1067年12月13日在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱享年67歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉萬德利勒-藍c。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard comte d'Évreux是Robert de Normandie和Herleva of Falaise的儿子，于1000年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧。他与Godehildis在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1067年12月13日在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱享年67岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉萬德利勒-藍c。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard comte d'Évreux was born in 1000, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France as the son of Robert de Normandie and Herleva of Falaise. He married Godehildis in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 13 December 1067, in Caen, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 67, and was buried in Saint-Wandrille-Rançon, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard comte d'Évreux est né en 1000, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, fils de Robert de Normandie et Herleva of Falaise. Il a épousé Godehildis à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1067, à Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Wandrille-Rançon, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Richard comte d'Évreux wurde 1000 in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Robert de Normandie und Herleva of Falaise geboren. Er hat in Frankreich Godehildis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1067 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Wandrille-Rançon, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Richard comte d'Évreux è nato il nel 1000 nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia come figlio di Robert de Normandie e Herleva of Falaise. Lui sposato Godehildis nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 dicembre 1067, nel Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Wandrille-Rançon, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard comte d'Évreuxは1000年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンでRobert de NormandieとHerleva of Falaiseの息子として生まれた。フランスでGodehildisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1067年12月13日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスケンで67歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-ワンドリレ-ランcオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard comte d'Évreux(은)는 1000년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 Robert de Normandie(와)과 Herleva of Falaise의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 프랑스에서 Godehildis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1067년 12월 13일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 카이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-완드릴레-랜c에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard comte d'Évreux nasceu em 1000, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França filho de Robert de Normandie e Herleva of Falaise. Ele casou-se com Godehildis em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1067, em Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Wandrille-Rançon, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard comte d'Évreux родился в 1000 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали Robert de Normandie и Herleva of Falaise. Он женился на женщине по имени Godehildis в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 13 декабря 1067 г. в местности каен, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-вандрилле-ранcон, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Richard comte d'Évreux nació en 1000, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia como hijo de Robert de Normandie y Herleva of Falaise. Se casó con Godehildis en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1067, en Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Wandrille-Rançon, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
